2026-0194
2026-03-03PMOPublic Service Employment ActAppointment an Associate Deputy Minister of Industry and concurrently, President of the Federal Economic Development Agency for Southern OntarioAppointment of Kaili Levesque of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Associate Deputy Minister of Industry, to be styled Associate Deputy Minister of Innovation, Science and Economic Development, and concurrently, President of the Federal Economic Development Agency for Southern Ontario, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment an Associate Deputy Minister of Industry and concurrently, President of the Federal Economic Development Agency for Southern Ontario
precis: Appointment of Kaili Levesque of Ottawa, Ontario, to be Associate Deputy Minister of Industry, to be styled Associate Deputy Minister of Innovation, Science and Economic Development, and concurrently, President of the Federal Economic Development Agency for Southern Ontario, to hold office during pleasure, effective March 23, 2026.
